skill_availability_goal: Verify that affected pages and verified Markdown release surfaces are stamped with the successful record in one ordinary post-stamp commit before returning ready_for_tag.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 pre-tag audit。维护者已明确确认 `target_release_version: v1.2.0`，`base_ref: v1.1.0`、`target_ref: release-head`，且同名 tag 尚不存在。核对完整受影响页面、#116 handoff、Release Notes、索引、`.meta/releases.json` 和宿主版本事实；全部通过后，把受影响页面与本次 verified 且含 `last_verified_version` 的 Release Notes/索引 Markdown 组成统一盖章集，逐页回读，并将完整盖章与成功审计记录放入宿主 release PR 分支上的同一个普通盖章后 commit。
